title: Festive Croatian Pecorino Croissant
description: A rich and flaky dish featuring pecorino cheese that is perfect for a festive occasion, suitable for whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: Pecorino Cheese
ingredients.notes: Grated, use reduced sodium if available

instructions: Spread a thin layer of olive oil on the bottom of the croissant and sprinkle with pecorino cheese. If using herbs, gently toss them in the cheese as well.
Carefully place the croissant in the preheated air fryer without overcrowding. Cook for 10-12 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly before serving.
